hotel_name: Khách sạn Hanoi Sail (Hanoi Sail Hotel)

reviews.title: Stay away
reviews.text: Worst hotel we have ever stayed in. No extra pillows no water.location middle of the bank district.would highly recommend staying away from this place.

reviews.title: A great value accommodation in Ha Noi
reviews.positives: Easy walk to French Quarter and Old Quarter. The bell boys were very welcoming and helpful on our arrival and departure with our luggage and communicating with our taxis. Our room was refreshed everyday.
reviews.negatives:
No air conditioning in the gym. There is an air conditioning unit but they could not find the remote to turn it on. 
Breakfast only is served until 9:30. Walls in the room need repainting and mattresses could be less firm.

reviews.title: Poor hospitality, worst staff
reviews.text:
I am a travel organizer,  I booked this hotel as per the demand from my guest.
They do not reply to tourist.
They do not deliver on their commitments. 
From sales team to hotel staff, they look racists and biased towards us.
They are very rigid and not supportive. 

Promised breakfast was not given even after multiple reminders.
Rooms booked in advance were cancelled and they were very rude.

reviews.title: Stay was good but front dest staff was not helpfull even  Two days they didnot mention that there is a lift till garage
reviews.positives: Clean,
reviews.negatives: Approach was bad , tour bus cant  come there we had to walk till road .

reviews.title: Terrible experience
reviews.text:
Had to move out to another hotel and did not bother for a refund.  I wanted to talk to the manager regarding our earlier request for rooms to be either connecting or near each other because we had an elderly with us who needs assistance always but they didn’t care. Manager was there but did not want to even talk to us. 

Bed is not comfortable, room has a bad smell, location is not accessible to tourist spots.

reviews.title: Except breakfast menu all is good
reviews.positives: Staff service
reviews.negatives: Breakfast Menu

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The white linen had stains, and the wall looked as if it had been splattered with tea. The staff couldn't assist with luggage and claimed there were few employees. The hotel was in a corner that I didn't like. I will not book it again. By the way, I was waiting for my preferred hotel to have space after my long bay trip. I'm back at my perfect hotel, La Siesta Premium Lakeside 5-star! As for breakfast, I didn't go.

reviews.title: Great place go stay. Thanka for the very accomodating and friendly staff.
reviews.positives: Great location, walking distance to most tourist attraction. I like the variety of breakfast and the pool is an addition to make my stay amazing.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Disappointing Experience — Not a 4-Star Hotel
reviews.text:
We booked the Hanoi Sail Hotel through Agoda based on what appeared to be an outstanding listing. The hotel was described as newly built in 2025, rated as a 4-star property, with review scores of 9.5 “Exceptional” overall and 9.3 for location. On paper, this combination sounded excellent and strongly influenced our decision to book.

Unfortunately, based on our actual stay, these ratings did not align with the reality of the property, and we found ourselves repeatedly questioning how such scores were achieved. Hmmm.

Another factor that influenced our booking was the impression that the hotel was located on the main road. We assumed this meant a reasonably large, well-positioned hotel with easy access. In reality, the hotel is not on the main road at all, but on a narrow slip road running parallel to it. Even taxi drivers hesitated when trying to turn off the main road to access it. The slip road itself is extremely tight — if oncoming traffic appears, vehicles must squeeze past each other with very little clearance. It feels awkward and uncomfortable, and is certainly not what we expected.

On arrival, guests enter via a wide staircase at the front of the building. While it looks presentable, there are no handrails, which makes both ascending and descending unsafe, particularly for older guests. I felt genuinely uneasy each time I had to walk down the stairs.

We were told we had been “upgraded” to a suite, which initially sounded generous. The suite was indeed large, with a main living area, a separate bedroom with another queen bed, a dining table, and a small kitchenette. At first glance, it felt impressive. However, once you look beyond the size, the design, layout, and finish were poor and outdated.

The décor appeared cheaply executed, with no sense of modern design or cohesion. It felt like a property shaped by personal taste rather than professional hotel design. In one room alone, there were ten downlights, which felt excessive and poorly thought out. Power points were plentiful but often inconveniently placed. In the second bedroom, the bed was positioned on the wrong wall, making the room feel awkward and impractical.

The lighting controls added to the frustration. With two rooms plus a bathroom, the switching system was confusing and counter-intuitive. Turning lights on or off in one area often affected lighting elsewhere, making it almost impossible to control the room sensibly. The two-way switching felt poorly planned — at times it genuinely felt like an April Fool’s joke rather than a functional system.

We specifically asked whether the room had a window, as this is important to us. We were told yes, but the reality was disappointing. The sliding door to the “balcony” had no handle, and when opened, led to a tiny space barely 70–75cm deep. The balcony was fully barred, and less than half a metre beyond the bars was a solid concrete wall of the neighbouring building. There was no view, no openness, no light, and no viable escape route in an emergency. It felt claustrophobic and unsafe.

The shower was another ongoing irritation. It dripped loudly and continuously, and controlling the temperature required extreme precision. The mixer tap had an incredibly narrow usable range — a millimetre either way and the water became uncomfortably cold or dangerously hot.

We also experienced a clear housekeeping coordination failure. One morning, shortly after returning from breakfast, room service came to clean the room. We explained that we had just got up and were preparing to go out, and asked them to return later. They agreed. When we returned later that day, the room had not been serviced at all. Reception later explained that housekeeping had knocked and received no answer — despite our earlier conversation.

We accepted that the room would not be cleaned, but requested fresh towels, which was all we really needed. These did not arrive. After following up again at reception, we were told they were “coming now”, ye

reviews.title: Great value for money with big and comfy rooms
reviews.positives:
The rooms were spacious, very clean, and had comfy beds. The bathroom was also very spacious, more than enough space for two people to lay out their toiletries and skincare. Good selection for breakfast. There was a small gym that had basic equipment enough for a satisfactory full-body workout. I saw the pool, but I didn't get to try it. It was a bit on the small side, but it looked good enough for a cooling dip -- it was on the rooftop, but it had a roof over it. 

The staff speak great English and were very attentive.
reviews.negatives: The location, while central enough, is on a narrow road in a residential area. It could be tricky to get to and from the hotel by car because residents in the neighboring area park on the roadside. There's no nearby convenience store like 7-Eleven or Circle K, but there are a few mom-and-pop shops within a 2-3 min walk for small things like drinks, chips, and gum.

reviews.title: Too Far
reviews.text: Too far out of the main centre for me. Nothing of interest nearby really. Staff were nice but seemed a bit inexperienced. Breakfast was ok but overall too far to walk and in a small backstreet. Looked closer on the map.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The rooms were well prepared and very spacious. The staff were very friendly and spoke good English that made it very easy to make any requests.
reviews.negatives: The location is across the highway from the Old Quarter which is a bit of a challenge. Often taxis would go to the wrong place or struggle to get us here because of the awkward roads. The shower head holder is a bit loose though and fell off on it's own once.

reviews.title: Be careful so that you  are not cheated
reviews.text:
We had booked a room with city view and  balcony during New Year eve 2026.We cleared the payment on arrival. After we checked in ,we found the room has no view and was quite small in size. I rushed to the reception and requested them to give the the room that I had booked.
The receptionist made a serious face and told me their system is not showing that I have booked a room with city view and a balcony. Then I showed my AGODA booking to them and they didn't have any other option and promised me that I will be provided with the booked room on the following day.  As mentioned I got it on the next day.
However, they never paid me the difference of the standard room and balcony room with view for 1 night.

I must say that there wasn't any air conditioning for the first 48 hours. Though it was December, the recirculated humid air made our stay very uncomfortable. Even after complaining several times they never started the air conditioning.

Good thigh is the breakfast and staff behavior was a positive side of this hotel. 

Location of the hotel is very poor since it is on a service road.

Lastly while checking out they insisted to write the review in front of them which I refused.(now I know how they got an exceptional review)

reviews.title: Great value for money, good for travellers who want more quiet but still stay near old town
reviews.positives: In a quiet part of town, just a quick Grab taxi ride away. Staff were really nice and responsive. They upgraded my room to a suite for free. Huge rooms. Great value for money. Breakfast was decent. There's a gym in the hotel too.
reviews.negatives: Woke up at 8:30am (after a red eye flight) due to noisy construction outside. Also while it's easy to get to old town via car, there's nothing really near the hotel at a walkable distance.

reviews.title: 1 night stay
reviews.text: This hotel was ok - good value for the cost. The room was clean and simple but there were no windows. The breakfast was not bad either. Good for the one night getting our bearings in Hanoi.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.positives: Good hotel for couple of nights stay, good breakfast, but not many options for dinner, near to train street and food Street , pls ask for Zack , the person at reception was very friendly. During checking out receptionist asked for my phone and did my rating on my behalf without even telling me. That's bad.
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: You get what you pay for.
reviews.text: The hotel and location was okay.

reviews.title: Great stay because of the staff
reviews.positives: The staff were really helpful. The sizes of the rooms were big considering the price
reviews.negatives: The location. The street where the hotel is located is very narrow making it difficult for our bus to pass through. We also had to be dropped off and picked up across the street where we had to walk up and down the stairs to pass through a wall/fence. You may refer to google satellite to check this

reviews.title: Location is scetchy
reviews.text: Didn't like the location.. hookers wondering around at night.  Dark street.  Have to walk across a very busy Blvd to get to the right side of where you wanna be.  If you're ok with all that then fine . Don't stay on 7th floor it below the restaurant so you hear chairs screeching early morning and the elevator ding dong every time someone uses it. It's annoying.. so do better

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Everything was amazing and the staff was lovely.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I stayed alone and found the room to be decent, quite new, and spacious. I was assisted with early check-in and late check-out for an additional fee. Everything was tidy, the location was okay, and around the area, there weren't many places to go. To cross the street, I had to book a ride since I couldn't walk to find restaurants. The room was a bit stuffy, so there was a slight odor, but it was still acceptable. Until I saw the toilet seat, which had yellow and black spots collected on it. I tried to clean it, but I guess a cleaning solution must be needed. However, it was okay since I always bring a toilet seat cover with me for peace of mind, even though it looked a bit unpleasant, so I felt a bit uneasy. In summary, the facilities were fine, and the price booked through Agoda was good. My friend visited briefly and also complimented it and intended to book, but I wouldn't recommend it solely because I didn't find the staff very enthusiastic. I heard/met a few staff members from the time I called - checked in - checked out, and they all seemed unfriendly and unenthusiastic. I still wonder why there’s that price on Agoda; I don't know how I got it like that 🥹. I travel a lot and usually find reception staff very pleasant and welcoming, which makes me return often; occasionally, I try new places, but I didn't feel welcomed at the lobby here. The person I found most lovely was the security guard, so they should give him a raise. He always paid attention to the guests, sat properly, frequently checked in with guests, helped me carry my suitcase, but I found it manageable, so I didn’t bother him. The rest of the time, I was struggling to carry my suitcase up and down the stairs and into the elevator 😆. After I provided feedback about the cleanliness, a staff member did follow up, but I still remember the previous attitude more. Everyone seemed a bit indifferent and not enthusiastic. This is the first time I've regretted staying at a hotel like this, so I’m sharing this post. I hope the hotel considers retraining the staff to be more open-hearted; it would be wonderful if they could eliminate odors, add a light fragrance, and clean the toilet!

reviews.title: Nice and clean hotel. Friendly staffs. Good value!
reviews.positives: The room is clean. Furnitures are in good condition. The air in the room also fresh. I especially like the design of a glass wall that separates the room and outside by a space, this really helps feel warmer in the winter. Breakfast is ok. The staffs are friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The location is not convenient compared to other hotels with same price.

reviews.title: New and very beautiful.
reviews.text:
On my first trip to Vietnam, I chose this hotel based on various reviews, even though I am not very fond of insects.

The hotel is new and clean, and the staff is friendly. The room is also clean, and there are glass doors separating the shower and toilet. The cleanliness was particularly impressive. There is a refrigerator available.

I included the breakfast buffet in my plan because of the good reviews, but since I went at 8 am, most of the food had already been eaten. There were only two other guests besides myself, so despite it being stated that breakfast was until 9:30, the food was not replenished.

Given that, I probably didn't need to opt for the breakfast-inclusive plan. If you want breakfast, you'll need to go early.

However, the staff was kind enough to boil noodles and fry eggs for us, which was very nice.

The number one issue is the location. It's far from the bustling area; although the hotel is very beautiful and clean, there are many old buildings in the surrounding area and the roads are narrow. There are no convenience stores or places to eat nearby.

While using Grab for transportation is not a problem, walking to the downtown area requires skill to cross busy roads.

I would recommend this place for those who prioritize cleanliness.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: the room is always been make up. good food and accommodating staff.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Good place to stay
reviews.text: Hotel staffs are very friendly and helpful. The facilities are worth what you paid . Room is cozy and clean. The location is not the best.Even the tourist attractions are nearby, needs to cross the busy road with so many vehicles.I was almost hit by motorcycle one time, and I used taxi even for 5 minutes walking distance. Overall, I recommend to stay at Hanoi sail hotel

reviews.title: My stay at Ha Noi Sail Hotel.
reviews.positives: This hotel is a very good place to stay. It's close to the centre of Ha Noi. The staff were all pleasant and helpful.The breakfasts were delicious. I'd recommend it to all travellers.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to dislike here.

reviews.title: I am satisfied.
reviews.text: We booked 2 rooms for a family of 4, and the room was spacious with one queen bed and one single bed, so I enjoyed using the queen bed alone. The bathroom was especially large, but there were some water stains that were disappointing. The breakfast was of better quality than I expected. The coffee had such a rich flavor that I keep thinking about it. I visited several cafes in Hanoi, but the coffee at this hotel was the best. The location is a bit far from the city center, so it took some time for a taxi to arrive, which was inconvenient, but it was so nice that I wish we had stayed more than one night. After the first night, we went to another accommodation in the Old Quarter, which was small and old, especially the bathroom was much smaller, making a comparison quite stark. Oh, and I appreciated that the heating worked well so I could sleep comfortably without being cold.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.positives: It had a very nice location! I had a pleasant stay and even booked for two nights extra. The room was clean and staff was friendly. Would come here again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Staff have been very good and helpfull. Breakfast was very good and plenty of choice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent

reviews.title: It's a pretty good hotel.
reviews.text: It's a little away from the old town, but you can call a Grab and go anywhere. Since there's a main road right in front, crossing it can be a bit dangerous. The breakfast is delicious, and the cost performance is good. I think it's just right for a solo trip.

reviews.title: Great stay. Would recommend to others
reviews.positives: Very nice staff and comfortable accommodations. Within walking distance to many stores and Old Quarter

reviews.title: Clean Room as the pictures
reviews.text: Based on the pictures, it is the same. It is clean and the front desk Ms. Min is very helpful. She accommodated our late request to book buffet breakfast, and our room was upgraded. We are thankful for the pleasant and prompt service. We recommend this hotel for you to stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good

reviews.title: Worth saty
reviews.text: Good and friendly staff new property valu for money min staff is very helpful nxt time will saty at this property for sure

reviews.title: Nice hotel next to the Old Quarter. Nice facilities and breakfast.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was not fancy but it was good. I liked the pho and the sunny-side up cooked fresh. Fruits were really good too. Room was clean and quiet and was larger than those inside the Old Quarter. It is located outside of the Old Quarter but within walking distance. Good ROI. We enjoyed our stay here.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Location  Location
reviews.text: Great staff.  Clean comfortable rooms.  Location is  ideal for old town.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Amazing staff, nice and clean room! 
Best hotel we have been in Hanoi in fair price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hanoi Sail Hotel is nice hotel to stay in Hanoi close to main market area. I have asked for change the room for personal reasons and they have changed the room after checking availability. It is nice hotel and staff is very helpful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very comfortable hotel

reviews.title: Stay
reviews.text: Hotel was very good overall. The staff at the front were always very kind and helpful. Small issues like our blowdryer not working were addressed. I will say, on google maps it says the wall to theQuarter is

reviews.title: Very good and we would stay there again.
reviews.positives: The accommodations were clean and the staff were very friendly. We were away from the noise of the city and it was quite quiet.
reviews.negatives: The only negative was crossing the highway to get into the main town otherwise everything was very good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Great place to stay.
Excellent staff. 
Somewhat difficult to get to walking.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: They  were polite, helpful, and informative.

reviews.title: Hotel Review
reviews.text: In my opinion, Hanoi Sail Hotel is clean and nice. And also the price is affordable. It is also near with the train street.

reviews.title: Hotel Sail Hanoi
reviews.positives: Nice service

reviews.title: New
reviews.text: Room clean and new
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear that you found the room clean and new. We hope to welcome you back for another pleasant stay!

reviews.title: Nice hotel, friendly welcoming people.
reviews.positives: Great place, friendly, helpful stuff, nice, spacious rooms with well equipped bathrooms. I found myself captivated by room and towels treated with touch of nice fragrances for a bit of extra satisfaction. Location neighboring local shops and small street various vendors. It is around 20 minutes walk from Hoan Kiem Lake, 30 min from Old Quarter, enough to benefit with "tourist tax" avoidance. Walking to main tourist attractions gives a great opportunity to experience the spirit of small streets with tens of vendors various specializations, mainly food, through clothes up to motorbike repair shops. Even though the hotel is near a busy street, you can't hear traffic noise in the rooms. Great stay, Great vibes.
reviews.negatives: Perhaps I was to exited, but no negatives comes to my mind. Or actually rooftop bar could have better selection of beers :-)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very good place to stay. The room is  cozy, clean and the staff kind and attentive. Pretty recommended.
reviews.response: Thank you for your kind words! We're delighted to hear you enjoyed your stay and appreciated the cozy, clean room and our attentive staff. We truly hope to welcome you back again soon!

reviews.title: Our stay was great and will definitely recommend this hotel to my friends and relatives when they visit Hanoi, Vietnam.
reviews.positives: The location is good and it’s near the Old Quarter where you can find restaurants, cafes, markets, and old buildings.
reviews.negatives: Sometimes the WiFi connection in our room was weak.

reviews.title: Best cost-performance!
reviews.text: I visited without any expectations, but I was surprised. The friendly staff's guidance, clean rooms, and delicious breakfast. The location is a bit disappointing, but it's okay if you use Grab to get around. I plan to use it again for my next trip.

reviews.title: Kind staff took care of me the whole time and were super friendly whenever I was coming and going.
reviews.positives: Quaint location and clean rooms
reviews.negatives: n/a

reviews.title: Good breakfast
reviews.text:
Good tasty breakfast and fairly clean room condition.
You will need to cross many big roads without traffic lights if you choose to walk from old quarter. Bit poor noise proof so can hear people talking from adjacent rooms and hallway.

reviews.title: Very attentive staff and convenient services, including transport and flexible check-in/out arrangements.
reviews.positives:
•	Exceptional cleanliness & service
Guests frequently commend the hotel’s immaculate rooms and friendly, helpful staff. For instance, one guest wrote: “The rooms are very clean and spacious. The staff are very lovely … The breakfast is delicious.”  ￼ Another praised the “facilities and hygiene” and rated their stay a perfect 10/10  ￼ ￼.
	•	Delightful breakfast variety
Many reviews highlight a satisfying and diverse breakfast, offering both international dishes and authentic Vietnamese cuisine. As one reviewer put it: “Great breakfast, big choice between international and typical Vietnam dishes.”  ￼ ￼
	•	Value for money
Several return guests mentioned that the quality of service and accommodations made their stay feel like a very good deal. One guest noted it was “cost-effective,” and another simply remarked: “Second time back. Still good, everything is ok for the price.”  ￼ ￼
	•	Helpful staff and services
Staff assistance—such as helping with luggage storage, arranging airport transfers, and even accommodating early arrivals or late departures—enhanced many travelers’ stays

reviews.title: Neat and clean hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is very neat and clean. The buffet also very good.

reviews.title: pleasant stay
reviews.positives: i think it's a new hotel, my room was basic yet really clean, the price is reasonable, and the staff was very friendly and accomodating. overall it offers really good value.

reviews.title: Four night stay
reviews.text:
The rooms are as exactly as advertised in their page. It has plenty of space and a closed door area where you can work but that space is a little too tight.

The area is accessible to Grab but there are times when traffic junctions are too tight so it’s a bit tricky to go inside.

The area feels safe even though it’s inside an alleyway.

About 5-15mins grab ride to Old Quarter, depending on the traffic.

About 15mins walk to Hoan Kiem Lake.

The buffet breakfast is great although on our last day there was no rice. Asians are sad haha

Almost all staff are good but one of their porter required us to tip him and did not leave our side unless given a tip. Although tipping is okay, I think it shouldn’t be demanded. The next time we saw him, we avoided him. 

The stay was overall okay except for this one event.

reviews.title: good accomodation, very satisfied, staff is nice especially Min at reception
reviews.positives: attentive service, hospitable and friendly staff
reviews.negatives: nothin

reviews.title: The breakfast is wonderful.
reviews.text: I stayed for 3 nights with my mother. It was located a bit far from downtown Hanoi, and we needed to use Grab for sightseeing each time, but there was no noise, and we had a comfortable stay. However, there was a mysterious space behind the door at the back of the room, which had something like a vent, so we could hear everything from the neighboring room, and it couldn't be closed. We had to be quiet at night to avoid making noise. Fortunately, the neighbor went to sleep after midnight.

reviews.title: Le pondría dos estrellas.
reviews.negatives: Mala ubicación si quieres reservar para excursión. No entran los bus por la calle, solo taxis. La piscina se suponía que era azul y no sé pudo utilizar porque estaba verde, sin limpiar. El desayuno ,el personal poco atento, el primer día le pedí unos huevos y el niño me dijo que no habían, parecía dormido. Las únicas amables , la señora de la limpieza porque hasta la directora ,o eso me pareció que era, no dió ni los buenos días. Reservé para cuatro días y luego tres noches más cuando volviera de la excursión, y anulé la reserva última.

reviews.title: Clean & quiet
reviews.text:
I had a pleasant stay of 1 day.
I mainly had contact with the reception staff, and they were all lovely.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: La limpieza de las habitaciones y la amabilidad del personal
reviews.negatives: La piscina, que parecía un charquito, no te llega a la cadera porque no llega al metro y estaba sucia

reviews.title: Hanoi place
reviews.text: The front desk people very nice and helpful allowed to help me with early check in and possibly to have a shower before my day trip rooms are clean thanks again AJ

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Las instalaciones son muy buenas, todo nuevo y limpio, moderno, muy cómodo. No es muy cerca del old quarter, 30 minutos caminando pero es cerca del lago, es una zona caótica pero que como todo en Hanoi

reviews.title: Short stay
reviews.text:
Hanoi sail hotel is a small hotel, not in the old quarters but walking distance along main roads.
They serve egg coffee which was good!
Staff is friendly and helpful

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La habitación era amplia y cómoda. Además nos subieron gratis de categoría de habitación porque había habitaciones disponibles

reviews.title: Better than expect
reviews.text: Clean room, good hotel

reviews.title: Para repetir
reviews.positives: El staff súper amable, las habitaciones muy bien y muy cómodas

reviews.title: Good place for staying
reviews.text: I stayed in Hanoi for a night with my husband and my son. The room is so clean and quiet so my son can sleep well.  The hotel & facilities are very new.

reviews.title: Good customer service.

reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear you enjoyed the convenient location and that our front desk team could promptly assist. We hope the rest of your stay was comfortable, and we look forward to welcoming you again!

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: Jack will take care of You
reviews.text: The hotel is very nice and conveniently located near the Old Quarter. The rooms are well clean and the staff is very cooperative.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good service

reviews.title: Very Clean and Newly Built Hotel
reviews.text:
Best place to stay near the Hoan Kiem Lake. Only 10mins walking / 3mins in grab

Love the hospitality, the infrastructure and the support Jack provides. Will definitely recommend everyone to look no forward and book it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Era cómodo, agradable los espacios, el desayuno bien completo, la gente con buena disposición.
reviews.negatives: La ubicación sale que es en el old quarter, pero hay que cruzar una calle muy concurrida para poder ir realmente al old quarter; aunque es cerca, se hace tedioso.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: If you want to stay one or two nights it's good place to stay.  However the bathroom is not properly cleaned. There is a smell of sewage coming from the bathroom drainage location I good, very near the Hoàn Kiếm lake

reviews.title: Estancia ideal y relajante para la visita a Hanoi.
reviews.positives:
La atención del staff es excepcional, muy atentos y amables. El hotel está perfectamente equipado y muy limpio, de hecho está impoluto y se ve que ponen mucho cariño en su mantenimiento y atención al cliente.
El desayuno es excelente, ideal para comenzar el día con energía y disfrutar de esta bella ciudad.
La situación, fenomenal, a un paso de los lugares más emblemáticos de Hanoi.
El confort en la habitación, excepcional. Camas muy cómodas, aire acondicionado y un silencio total para descansar y cargar baterías!
Definitivamente recomendable al 100%. En nuestra próxima visita a Hanoi repetiremos seguro!!!!!!

reviews.title: Accommodations that provide satisfaction for the price.
reviews.text: I chose this accommodation as a place to stay for one night after returning from Sapa, without much expectation, but I was impressed by the excellent breakfast and cleanliness, so I wanted to leave a review. The room by the lake had a lot of mosquitoes, which made it a bit challenging, so I think I liked this place even more. Also, the staff at the desk could speak Korean, so they helped me with various things, making it a memorable place for my last night in Hanoi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Excelente ! Lugar limpio y la atención del personal fue excelente. 

Recomendadisimo.

reviews.title: Nice place to stay in Hanoi

reviews.title: This stay offers great value for the price
reviews.text:
This hotel offers excellent value for its location near the Old Quarter. The staff were thoughtful and incredibly helpful throughout my stay. I also really liked the room; it was comfortable and well-equipped with amenities like an iron and ironing board, which I truly appreciated.
While the room was great, the breakfast area needs attention. Although the food quality was fine, the restaurant floor was sticky and the glassware wasn't properly cleaned—I noticed visible stains on several cups. Hygiene is essential for any meal service, and improving these standards would make the breakfast a much better experience for guests. Overall, it's still a fantastic place to stay for the price, but the dining area definitely needs more effort.

reviews.positives: Hotel très bien literie confortable et la piscine sur le toit était très bien

reviews.title: Very good experience
reviews.text: The staff was absolutely amazing, the place was extremely clean and it was very quiet during the night, the only little thing is that you have to walk 25 min to get to the center but getting a “grab” there is very cheap. I completely recommend this hotel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La chambre était spacieuse propre et confortable. Pas trop mal situé pour les visites.Personnel sympathique et à l'écoute. Nous avons pris l'excursion pour Ninh binh au départ de l'hôtel tout était parfait. Je recommande.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Good choice
reviews.text: The service here is excellent, starting with the very professional and kind doorman. Everything went smoothly, and I loved that my room was completely undisturbed and quiet.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
- Salle de bain très bien
- Personnel sympathique et accueillant
- L'hôtel est situé dans une rue calme, à l'abri du trafic
- Sur booking il n'est pas précisé quelle chambre à une fenêtre mais sur leur site oui
reviews.negatives:
- Le petit-déjeuner pourrait être plus diversifié
- On entends les bruits des couloirs et de la chambre d'à côté

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very comfortable stay in Hanoi centre. Room was very clean and the facilities were good. Enjoyed my stay here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
L'hôtel était bien, rien d'exceptionnel mais bien !
Propre avec de l'eau chaude :)
reviews.negatives:
Un peu loin du cebtre ville !
La vue de la fenêtre n'était pas terrible ...

reviews.title: Excellent stay if you like peace
reviews.text: We had a pleasant stay. The hotel staff arranged for us our trip to Ninh Binh the night earlier. Also for our early morning day trip, we were provided take away box of some fruits.  However, the hotel is situated in the inner lane of the main road. Crossing the road and going to old square can be a bit of hassle though nearby due to continuous traffic. Otherwise, excellent value stay

reviews.title: Hotel propre, personnel à l’écoute
reviews.positives: Le personnel se démène pour vous apporter des solutions et sont à l’écoute. J’ai eu l’occasion de tomber sur Jack qui m’a été d’une grande aide.
reviews.negatives: La premiere chambre que j’ai eu avais une odeur d’égout (en provenance de la salle de bain). J’en ai parlé au staff (Jack) qui m’a immédiatement changé de chambre. La deuxième chambre était parfaite, donc léger inconvénient mais rien de très gênant, j’y retournerai !

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text:
We enjoyed the splendid stay here! 
Although the location is out of the touristy central area of the town, the facilities, the staff and the experience were nothing short of ideal. 
We highly recommend this place to anyone who wants a quieter neighborhood. 
Upon check-in, the kind receptionist gave us a free upgrade of the room to one with windows. That was a cherry on top.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour avec un bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives: La piscine bien rafraîchissante, la salle de sport complète, et un immense merci aux équipes, ils surclassent quand ils ont de la disponibilité !
reviews.negatives: La literie était un peu dure et la rue de l’hotel n’est pas pratique pour que les taxis viennent nous récupérer et nous ramener.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff are friendly and enthusiastic in their support. We felt truly comfortable and had a very nice impression throughout our stay at Hanoi Sail Hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Rapport qualité prix au top. Hôtel avec une petite piscine sur le toit, une salle de gym et un bar. Sur notre demande, nous avons été surclassés : grande chambre, avec fenêtre (ce n'est pas toujours le cas à Hanoï !) et étage élevé. Ce sans surcoût. Emplacement idéal pour visiter le quartier colonial, sachant qu'il faudra composer avec les traversées à pied 'acrobatiques' des boulevards et rues dans Hanoï - gaffe aux scooters !
reviews.negatives: Ayant dû quitter l'hôtel très tôt pour nous rendre à l'aéroport, le restaurant était fermé (pas de petit déjeuner, au départ inclus dans la prestation). On nous avait proposé un en-cas à emporter, mais il ne nous a finalement pas été remis à notre départ (personne à la réception). Il s'agit peut être d'une incompréhension de notre part. Cela n'affecte pas notre très bon ressenti global

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel is clean and convenient located in hoàn kiem. Staff was very nice. I booked last minute a no windows room, but they upgraded me to a room with windows for free. I would definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'hôtel est très bien , propre avec toutes les commodités nécessaires. Le plus je dirais de cet hôtel est le personnel. Jeune, souriant et au petit soin avec nous . Nous avons vraiment goûté à l'hospitalité vietnamienne
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner reste à améliorer.

reviews.title: Amazing hotel in Old Quarters area!!!!
reviews.text:
We stayed in this hotel for 3 nights and the location was amazing and the hotel really lived up to it's ratings.
Staff was very helpful and friendly and even upgraded our room to a balcony one for free!!!
Highly recommend taking this hotel if you plan on staying near Old Quarters area.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'hôtel était parfait pendant les quelques jours que j'y ai passés. Le personnel était tres gentil et aux petits soins. La localisation est tres bien, à quelques minutes des Vieux Quartiers. Je recommande

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text: All the staff were very friendly and the room was very confortable. Good variety of western and local breakfast options.

reviews.title: Un hébergement de qualité pour découvrir Hanoi
reviews.positives: Très belle chambre, un accueil de qualité, un superbe petit déjeuner et de beaux équipements
reviews.negatives: Pas très bien insonorisé (bruits dans la chambre jouxtant la nôtre)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Vị trí gần trung tâm. Sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè và sẽ quay lại nếu có dip

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'accueil, le logement, la propreté et la tranquillité, le calme.

reviews.title: Will be back.
reviews.text: Friendly staff, the buffet breakfast is very convenient; if not included in the room rate, it's 150k for two adults. It would be great if the room had an additional fan for better air circulation. I managed to find a room at a low price and also received a free room upgrade offer, which I was very satisfied with. The hotel is close to the center, making it convenient for moving around. In conclusion, if anyone is looking for a hotel to stay at when coming to Hanoi, this is a good option. If I have the opportunity in the future, I will come back, hoping the quality will still be as good as it was in the beginning.

reviews.title: Sejour Hanoi
reviews.positives: Proprete des chambres, accueil.
reviews.negatives: Hotel un peu eloigne du centre ancien.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was very clean and matched the photos perfectly. The shower room and toilet were also clean, and the water pressure of the shower was just right. The bed was neither too hard nor too soft, just the right feel. There were no particular complaints during my stay. The staff were also very kind and friendly. Regarding the location, if you take the bus from the airport, the nearest bus stop will probably be the Hanoi Opera House, but I think it might be easier for those with heavy large suitcases (especially women) to use Grab or a taxi.

reviews.text: highly recommend this hotel when you’re in hanoi.

reviews.title: Excellent hôtel pour Hanoï

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très propre, petit déjeuner excellent je recommande

reviews.title: No Jack, but Alex! 👍
reviews.text: Read the reviews before book the hotel, everyone were mentioning Jack.  But for me, Alex is more helpful since i didnt meet Jack. Lol. He done such a good care, greet us since the first day we stay, and provided the infos we need. Overall we need more staff like Jack and Alex. Clean and big room, new renovated hotel, and nice lv.8 dinning room view. Breakfast was alright, not many options but still acceptable. We would like to stay here again when we visit Hanoi in future. Hail Alex!!! 😂
reviews.response: Thank you so much for your kind and thoughtful review! We're thrilled to hear that Alex made such a great impression during your stay — we'll be sure to pass along your praise to him. It's also wonderful to know you enjoyed the clean, spacious room and our newly renovated facilities, including the dining room view. We appreciate your feedback on breakfast and will continue to improve. We can’t wait to welcome you back to Hanoi — Alex and the whole team will be here to greet you!

I would say, QuyeN is the one who made us so comfortable by meeting & dealing every need of ours, smoothly & swiftly. Her level of hospitality was simply the BEST.

Great value hotel! Amazing staff, very helpful! They booked me a bus to Ho Giang and a taxi from hotel to get to a pickup location.
Normally I would write a lower value for location, but you can pay 16000 dong for a grab bike to get to the old square. Very convenient!

All the staff are very friendly, and the cleanliness of the accommodation is good. I had a satisfying stay, and if I come to Hanoi again, I would consider staying here again.

reviews.text: I arrived late at around midnight and checked in, yet the staff were friendly. Despite booking a really cheap room, I was upgraded to one with a view. First of all, the bathroom is clean and spacious, and haha, I carry a lint roller with me, so it's hygienic, lol! The air conditioning cools down super quickly, so I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Great Stay at affordable price at a good location
reviews.text:
I had a really pleasant stay at this hotel. The staff was extremely courteous and welcoming throughout. I was also pleasantly surprised to receive a complimentary upgrade from a standard double room to a standard twin room, which made the experience even better.

The hotel itself was very clean, well-maintained, and located in a great area, making it convenient to get around. Overall, a comfortable and hassle-free stay — I would definitely recommend this place to others.

reviews.title: One month trip to Vietnam.
reviews.text:
Sale Hotel ~
It's about a 5-7 minute walk to the Opera House near Hoan Kiem. A good location for walking around the city for 3 days. Breakfast is included for about 40,000 VND. The room condition is good. The staff are very friendly.
I would like to express my gratitude to Jasmine and Hao for helping me with inquiries about the bus company~♡♥︎♡
reviews.response: 별점 10점 만점을 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다! 고객님의 따뜻한 상품평 덕분에 저희 Hanoi Sail Hotel 팀 모두가 큰 힘을 얻었습니다. 앞으로도 하노이에서 최고의 휴식을 선사할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 다음에 또 뵙기를 고대하겠습니다!

reviews.title: 飯店全新，新近renew過，完全沒有過去網路評論所說的問題。那是很久以前的review，完全過時，不值得參考。早餐很讚，很豐富，我喜歡他們現煎到剛剛好、嫩嫩的荷包蛋。房間很寬敞、舒適，且設備完善。餐廳在第八樓最高樓層，可以看到外面的海港，難
reviews.positives: 櫃檯人員無微不至跟熱忱的態度，讓我們賓至如歸。尤其是Quyen，總是很認真地提供最滿分的服務給我們，像是附近的餐食、機場車輛、早餐服務的時間……。非常非常感謝Quyen對我們的照顧。有妳真好～

היתה חוויה מעולה
החדרים נקיים וחדשים

reviews.title: Breakfast ổn so với tầm giá, cách tính tiền của KS cũng như kết nối giữa KS và booking thật tệ!
reviews.negatives: 1) Mình đăng ký  phòng gia đình 3 người, nhận dc 1 phòng 1.6m, 3 người ngủ không được, 2) check in đã Đăng ký  người thứ 3 con gái mình ( đã nói rỏ con 12 tuổi, và khi kiểm tra giá thì rất cao so với ở 2 người, tuy nhiên mình đồng ý ). Đến check in KS KS yêu cầu làm việc lại với bên booking vì Ks Tính phụ thu 300,000vnd/ đêm! Thực tình mình không hiểu cách làm việc giữa Booking và KS!
